ddls:
CREATE TABLE "database_engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the database engine */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the database engine */,
  "engine_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the database engine */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the database engine */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., open-source, commercial) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the database engine is currently active or deprecated */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the official documentation for the database engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Categorizes the feature (e.g., settings, skipping indices) */,
  "is_enabled_by_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feature is enabled by default */,
  "supported_engines" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of engines that support the feature */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the official documentation for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature support entry */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database engine */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "supported" INTEGER /* Whether the feature is supported */,
  "support_level" TEXT /* Indicates the level of support (e.g., full, partial, experimental) */,
  "support_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the support */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the support information was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the support information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_support_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_support_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_support_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number for contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database engine */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* The exact date and time the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* The type of access (e.g., read, write, update) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
